title: Management Executive
description:
Job Description

We are looking for a dedicated and organised Management Executive (Administrative) to support admissions, student matters, parent relations, and school administrative operations. The role requires close collaboration with Vice-Principals, Year Heads, parents, and external stakeholders to ensure smooth school operations throughout the academic year.

Key Responsibilities

Admissions Management

  • Oversee Senior High Admissions (end April – July).

  • Oversee Junior High Admissions (mid-April – end August, December).

  • Act as Admissions Officer for Direct School Admission (DSA) for Junior High (JH) and Senior High (SH), including:

    • Conceptualizing admission processes and registration workflows

    • Managing registration websites and student databases

    • Informing students and parents of test dates

    • Preparing for selection interviews

    • Compiling final admission lists

    • Assisting Vice-Principals and Year Heads in drafting responses to parents and students

  • Support DSA / Joint Admission Exercise (JAE) appeals and enrolment matters for returning Singaporean and international students.

Junior High Student Matters

  • Coordinate health (Mar–Apr) and dental screenings (Feb).

  • Manage NRIC-related matters.

  • Coordinate Quality of School Experience (QSE) Survey (July).

  • Plan and coordinate activities based on students’ timetables and inform personal mentors.

  • Conceptualize and organize Parent-Teacher Meetings (PTM) (April, June, July).

  • Liaise with language centers for third-language programs.

  • Support Sec 1 Posting Exercise (end Nov – Dec).

  • Coordinate Junior High 1 Orientation (January).

  • Support School Tours and Open House, including website registration and school list analysis.

Parent Support & Relations

  • Support Parent-In-Action (PAACT) activities, including:

    • AGM and Executive Committee meetings

    • Principal–Parent meetings

    • Teachers’ Day celebrations

    • PAACT membership registration during Junior High 1 Orientation

    • Communication of school events and MOE updates

  • Liaise with PAACT on fund-related matters such as:

    • Printing, assignment, and distribution of donation cards

    • Parent registrations

General Administrative Duties

  • Coordinate Learners’ Engagement Survey (each semester).

  • Cover reception duties daily from 4.00 p.m. to 6.00 p.m.

  • Verify student details with HR agencies.

  • Handle printing of name cards.

  • Coordinate International Student Perception Survey.

  • Cover duties at the Reception and Student Services Centre (SSC) when required.

Development & Ad-Hoc Projects

  • Support development projects such as:

    • School signage

    • Donor boards

    • Partnership boards

  • Assist during:

    • Parent-Teacher Meetings and School Tours (on actual event days)

    • DSA admissions for JH & SH (registration days)

  • Handle admissions-related emails and phone enquiries.

  • Perform other ad-hoc administrative duties as assigned.

Requirements

  • Minimum Degree or equivalent qualification.

  • At least 2 years of working experience in a school environment.

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

  • A team player with high initiative and ability to work independently.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

  • Able to perform well in a fast-paced environment.
    Interested candidate, please send your CV to: joinus@educare.sg or Click Apply

    Stephanie Ang l Educare Human Capital

    Reg No.: R1331070 l EA No.: 02C4944

    Please note that the personal data you provided in your job application will be collected, used, and disclosed by Educare Human Capital to assess your suitability for employment and manage your application, including consideration for future opportunities.

    EA License No: 11C4731

postedCompany.description:
Since its inception in 2004, Educare Human Capital (EHC) Private Limited has been providing Human Resource (HR) solutions to the schools, as well as Government and private organisations, especially within the Education industry.

It all started from the proposal in August 2004 by the Singapore Teachers’ Union (STU) to Ministry of Education of Singapore (MOE) to ease the workload of teachers so that they can focus on teaching, when Educare Human Capital (EHC) Private Limited piloted and implemented the Teacher Assistant Scheme. The scheme aimed to elevate teaching and teachers’ lives through the recruitment and management of TAs, as they assist the teachers administratively and operationally. The success of the scheme has since made EHC one of the most credible education manpower service providers amongst others, where it has been trusted with staffing within the realms of administration, ICT, laboratories, sports coaching and even management of the schools.

Today, EHC serves more than 200 Singapore schools, presenting itself as one of the principal Education Human Resource solutions providers in Singapore.

Beyond the schools, EHC has made its foray into other government sectors, and had clinched multiple contracts to provide manpower services for the government ministries and organisations, such as the Ministry of Home Affairs (Commercial Affairs Department), Ministry of Health, Ministry of Finance (VITAL), The State Courts, Singapore Workforce Development Agency and Energy Market Authority. EHC has also explored business opportunities to the private sector within the education realm. EHC has deployed staff to international schools and institutions, which include ISS International School, Hollandse School Singapore, Tien Hsia Language Centre and others. Over the past 3 years, EHC’s total headcount within the government organisations (Non-MOE) and private sector grew by more than 300%, representing its broadening market presence.

Even as EHC continues to diversify its business, it never strays away from its founding philosophy and philanthropy. EHC has been and always will be striving to maintain at least 60% of its services to the schools in Singapore, so as to give back to schools and communities, where it shapes destinies through job creation, resolving unemployment and off-loading admin duties of teachers.
postedCompany.name: EDUCARE HUMAN CAPITAL PRIVATE LIMITED

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
